description: Amend the V0.8 Kickoff to incorporate the findings from the Archon Deep-Dive. Re-architect V0.8 around a YAML-based DAG workflow engine, an LLM router, and the porting of Archon's 17 default workflows.
scope: 1. Replace the hardcoded 6-stage lifecycle logic with a customizable YAML DAG parsing engine (still enforcing the L2/L3 Gatekeeper json contract output). 2. Add the LLM router to dynamically select workflows. 3. Add the requirement to port and support built-in high-frequency workflows (similar to Archon's 17 default workflows). 4. Add support for custom workflow authoring.
out_of_scope: No actual coding or implementation of the router/engine yet. This is an amendment to the V0.8 Planning documents.
